notes: With default settings, the game throws the error: "Failed to call CDemuxSource::OpenStream( stream ). : [0x80004001] Error: 0x80004001". The only way to fix it is to add the launch options "PROTON_LOG=1" and "LANG=ja_JP.UTF-8". However, the game then "can't convert ANSI strings to UNICODE" and asks to verify file integrity. Changing to other locales do not work.
title: Mayjasmine Episode01 - What is God?
